title: How to Find your Calling | Robert Greene & Ryan Holiday
summary: This interview features authors Robert Greene and Ryan Holiday discussing creativity, mastery, mentorship, and finding one's calling. They explore the creative process, the importance of apprenticeship, and how modern technology and social media affect people's ability to connect with their true purpose and achieve fulfillment.

events.description: Robert Greene was in Italy where he met Jost Elfers and conceived the idea for The 48 Laws of Power during a walk in Venice
Jay-Z quoted The 48 Laws of Power in a Playboy magazine interview
50 Cent's literary agent Mark Gerald contacted Robert Greene about a potential collaboration, leading to The 50th Law

key_claims.claim: The 48 Laws of Power has sold 1.2 million copies worldwide
The 48 Laws of Power has been banned by various prisons in the US
Ryan Holiday was around 19 years old when he started doing research for Robert Greene
Robert Greene was 36 years old and hadn't had much success when he conceived The 48 Laws of Power in 1995
The 48 Laws of Power had a big initial impact in the hip-hop world
50 Cent claimed The 48 Laws of Power helped rescue his music career after he got shot
The Laws of Human Nature has sold over half a million copies
99% of people polled say their jobs are BS according to David Graeber's book
Robert Greene knew he wanted to be a writer since he was eight years old
Jews in Europe were kept outside major professions for centuries, which contributed to their creative output in writing and composing
